# Chapter 5: Adaptive and learning control  (~100 pp)
- 5.1 Why adaptive (10) · 5.2 Model-reference adaptive control (15) · 5.3 Self-tuning regulators (15) · 5.4 Reinforcement-learning control engineering-first (18) · 5.5 Safe RL: shields, constraint-respecting policies (15) · 5.6 Failure section: adaptation in the wrong direction; learning-induced instability (12) · 5.7 Cross-references: Volume VII chapter 17 connection (15)

**Archetype**: control, learning, failure. **Project**: train a small RL controller on a simulated plant; analyse failure modes. **Exercises**: 25.
